**🎮 Whiteout Survival — new automations**
- 🔥 **Alliance Furnace Upgrade Pack** — the bot jumps into alliance chat and opens the requested pack automatically
- 🏅 **Mercenary Prestige** — new event supported
- 🧩 **Dreamscape Memory** — auto-solves the puzzle (solver + scene recognition)
- 🗺️ **World map (main_world)** support: city ↔ map transitions and entering chat straight from the world map

**🆕 New game — Kingshot (work in progress)**
- First automations: Fishing Tournament, alliance help, main city
- **Gift code** support for Kingshot

**🔔 Reacts to in-game notifications**
- The bot catches push notifications and launches the right scenarios on its own
- Configurable right from the dashboard

**✅ Reliability**
- The bot detects **which game is actually running** on the device and adopts it
- No longer taps **disabled (greyed-out) buttons**
- Fixed closing of bright "snowy" deal-card popups
- License issues no longer **crash the bot** — graceful degradation on connectivity problems

**🖥️ Dashboard**
- Unified player-state overview (live + persisted in one place)
- ⚡ Faster modules page
- Instant click-approval decisions (approvals) + live overlay refresh
